name: Full review flow fetches GitHub PR and displays AI review report
description: When a user submits a real GitHub PR URL, the app fetches the PR data, calls the AI, and renders a complete review report including score bar, merge verdict badge, summary text, and review category cards.

planSteps.description: Paste 'https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/1' into the PR URL input
Click the Analyze PR button and wait for analysis to complete
A review report card appears showing the PR title and a score out of 100
A colored progress bar is visible representing the quality score, positioned below the score label
A merge verdict badge is displayed showing one of: Approve Merge, Request Changes, or Needs Discussion
A 2-3 sentence summary paragraph is shown describing the PR
Review category cards for Bugs, Security Issues, Performance, Clarity, and Positives are all visible on the page
